title: Echoes Of Time
description: Adds TIME TRAVEL... back a few seconds (plus other stuff)
body:
# 🌀 Echoes of Time
Echoes of Time is a lore-rich, exploration-focused mod that expands the deep mysteries of the Ancient City and the Warden with powerful new relics, forgotten technology, and time-bending artifacts.

## 📜 Overview
Long ago, the ancients of the Deep Dark uncovered secrets not meant for mortals—fragments of time itself. With their downfall, their creations were buried in silence. Now, deep beneath bedrock and through the darkness of the Warden’s domain, you can reclaim these lost Echoes.

## 🧭 Features
### 🔮 Totem of Echoes
A powerful artifact that rewinds your position and state after death. Crafted with Warden Ribs and a Totem of Undying.
- How to Use:
The Totem of Echoes activates automatically when you die, just like a normal Totem of Undying. Instead of just saving your life, it rewinds you back in time — including your location, health, hunger, potion effects, and inventory. You’ll reappear in the exact spot and state you were in seconds before death, as if nothing ever happened.

### ⚡ Scepter of Echoes
A staff fueled by a Temporal Core, looted from the Warden. Allows you to manipulate time to evade death or strike with devastating force. 
- How to Use:
Hold right-click (or your active item button) to charge the Scepter. The longer you charge (up to 10 seconds), the further back in time you can rewind. Release the button to instantly rewind your state and location, undoing damage or escaping danger.

### ⏳ Fractured Hourglass
Ancient relics found in Ancient City loot. Used for crafting powerful items.

### 🦴 Warden Ribs
Rare drops from the Warden, used in powerful crafting recipes tied to the forgotten technologies of the Deep Dark.

## 📦 Installation
Minecraft Version: 1.20+

Modloader: Forge

## 🏁 In Progress
Performance upgrades (which will enable longer rewinds) and more time-themed items are coming soon!

## _Reclaim the past. Bend time. Awaken the Echoes._
